meta.title: Start a Tech Career — No Experience Required | 42 Belgium
meta.description: Land a remote tech job with no CS degree. 42 Belgium's free training program helps career changers break into IT with hands-on skills employers need.

hero.headline: Land a remote tech job — no CS degree required
hero.subheadline: Career changers and job seekers: 42 Belgium's free, peer-to-peer program gives you the skills to break into tech and work from anywhere.

whatYouLearn.title: What you'll gain
outcomes: Real programming skills through hands-on projects — not lectures
A portfolio that proves your abilities to employers
The confidence to apply for remote jobs in tech
Peer-to-peer learning that mirrors real team collaboration
Direct pathways to job opportunities in Belgium's growing IT sector

whoItsFor.title: Is this for you?
whoItsFor.description: You're considering an IT career change but don't have a tech background. Maybe you're exploring job opportunities in a new field, looking for remote jobs, or simply ready for a career switch. No prior experience needed — just motivation.

ctaSection.title: Ready to start your tech career?
ctaSection.description: Join thousands of career changers who found new job opportunities through 42 Belgium. No degree required. No fees. Just your determination.
